product_overview: A minimalist React-based e-commerce storefront for architectural furniture and objects that lets users discover a curated catalog, view product details and manage a shopping cart. The site focuses on browsing, filtering, product exploration and local cart management.
core_goals: Discover and browse curated products and new arrivals
Filter and sort the product catalog to find relevant items
View detailed product information and select finishes/materials
Add products to a local shopping cart and edit cart contents
Initiate purchase inquiries or proceed to checkout from the cart

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Move between Home, Collection, Detail and Cart pages with a persistent navigation and footer across the site.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See home hero and featured products -> Navigate to /collection -> See collection overview and filters -> Navigate to /cart -> See current cart contents
Navigate to /collection -> Select a product to view details -> Navigate to /detail -> Return to /collection -> Navigate to /

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Browse the product collection, use filters and sorting, load more products, and preview or add items from the collection.
user_flows: Navigate to /collection -> Scroll through products -> Apply Category filter (e.g., Lighting) -> Apply Material filter (e.g., Oak) -> Apply Sort (e.g., Price: Low/High) -> Select a product to view details -> Navigate to /detail
Navigate to /collection -> Scroll through products -> Hover over a product to reveal add affordance -> Add product to cart from the collection -> Navigate to /cart -> See the added product in cart
Navigate to /collection -> Scroll through products -> Use Load More to see additional items -> Continue browsing

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Inspect a single product with a visual gallery, choose finishes/materials, and take purchase actions (add to cart or inquire).
user_flows: Navigate to /detail -> View product image gallery -> Select material or finish -> Add product to cart from detail page -> Navigate to /cart -> See the item with selected finish and price
Navigate to /detail -> View product image gallery -> Select material or finish -> Initiate inquiry for purchase -> See inquiry CTA acknowledged

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: View and manage items added to the cart including adjusting quantities, removing items, and reviewing order summary before proceeding to checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> See listed items with image, finish, and price -> Increase quantity for an item -> See subtotal update -> Decrease quantity for an item -> See subtotal update
Navigate to /cart -> See listed items with image, finish, and price -> Remove an item from cart -> See cart update and item removed
Navigate to /cart -> Review order summary (subtotal and estimated total) -> Proceed to Checkout

routes.description: Home page with hero section and featured products
Product collection page with filters and sorting
Product details page with options to add to cart

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Users can navigate between Home, Collection, and Cart

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Users can browse products and apply filters
user_interactions: Click on a product card to view details

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Users can add products to cart and manage them
user_interactions: Click Add to Cart button in Detail page
